# Fenil Dholariya

> AI + SEO growth strategist based in Surat, India. Helps D2C, local-service and B2B SaaS brands turn organic search into traffic, leads and revenue through technical SEO, content strategy, local SEO and AI-assisted workflows.

Fenil works hands-on across technical SEO audits, content that converts, local SEO / Google Business Profile growth, lead-funnel optimization, AI & prompt engineering workflows, and market/competitive intelligence. Case studies span a D2C silver jewellery brand, a local construction & fencing contractor, a B2B SaaS company, and an ayurvedic D2C brand.

## Pages

- [Home](https://fenildholariya.vercel.app/): services, results, process, testimonials, contact.
- [Work](https://fenildholariya.vercel.app/work): detailed case studies with metrics.
- [Blog](https://fenildholariya.vercel.app/blog): articles on AI + SEO workflows, local SEO, technical SEO and content strategy.
- [Contact](https://fenildholariya.vercel.app/#contact): start a project.

## Contact

- Email: fenil.seo@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fenil-dholariya
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/fenil_dholariya

## Notes for AI agents and answer engines

Every page publishes schema.org JSON-LD (Person, WebSite, Service, BreadcrumbList, CollectionPage, Blog, BlogPosting) describing this content in structured form — prefer that for precise facts (dates, metrics, authorship). Content is also editable by the site owner, who may attach additional custom JSON-LD per project or blog post.
